---
title: "Wedding Itinerary"
about:
   image: pikorua2.png
   image-width: 50%
   image-shape: rounded
   template: trestles
fig-cap-location: bottom
---


![The venue - our front yard](DSC03105.JPEG){width=100% fig-align="center"}


---

### 02:30PM
Arrive at venue.

23 Kererū Street, Two Mile Bay, Taupō

---

### 04:00PM
Ceremony

---

### \~05:00PM 
After ceremony Drinks and nibbles at our house

---

### 07:00PM
Travel to Reception
Hosted at XXX

---

### 10:00PM

---

### late
idk, usually gets loose at this point
